Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

CTN 4, 010 [Enuma Anu Enlil 14][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

* 30 U₄ 1-KAM₂

3.45 GUB

eš ša₂-na-<bi> eš?-gi

3 UŠ 45! NINDA GUB

(o 1) On the 1st day the Moon is present (for) 3;45 - three (and) two-thirds .... It is present for 3 UŠ 45 nindanu.

o 22

U₄ 2-KAM₂

7.30 GUB

un ba-a

7 UŠ 30 NINDA GUB

(o 2) On the 2nd day it is present for 7;30 - seven (and) a half. It is present for 7 UŠ 30 nindanu.

o 33

U₄ 3-KAM₂

15!(14) GUB

u₂-du-li ia!

1/2 DANNA GUB

(o 3) On the 3rd day it is present for 15 - a single ten (and) five. It is present for 1/2 double-hour.

o 44

U₄ 4-KAM₂

30 GUB

ba-a

1 DANNA GUB

(o 4) On the 4th day it is present for 30 - thirty. It is present for 1 double-hour.

o 55

U₄ 5-KAM₂

1 GUB

de-eš-šu₂

2 DANNA GUB

(o 5) On the 5th day it is presnt for 1 00 - one. It is present for 2 double-hours.

o 66

U₄ 6-KAM₂

1.12 GUB

de-eš-šu₂ u₂-du-li mi₃-in

2 DANNA 12 UŠ GUB

(o 6) On the 6th day it is present for 1 12 - one, a single ten (and) two. It is present for 2 double-hours, 12 UŠ.

o 77

U₄ 7-KAM₂

1.24 GUB

diš ⸢ni?-il⸣ lam-ma di-ri-ga

2 DANNA 2/3! DANNA 4 UŠ GUB

(o 7) On the 7th day it is present for 1 24 - one, twenty, four exceeding. It is present for 2 double-hours, 2/3 double-hour, 4 UŠ.

o 88

⸢U₄ 8v⸣-KAM₂

1.36 GUB

diš ba-ga-ša₂

3 DANNA 6 UŠ GUB

(o 8) On the 8th day it is present for 1 36 - one, thirty-six. It is present for 3 double-hours, 6 UŠ.

o 99

[U₄ 9]-⸢KAM₂⸣

1.48!(18) GUB

x x x ni-il di-ri-ga :.

3!(2) DANNA 18 UŠ GUB

(o 9) On the 9th [day] it is present for 1 48 - ... twenty (sic) exceeding. It is present for 3 double-hours, 18 UŠ.

o 1010

U₄ 10-KAM₂

2 ⸢GUB⸣

[me₂]-en-na!

4 DANNA GUB 2 DANNA GE₆ uḫ-ḫur

(o 10) On the 10th day it is present for 2 - two. It is present for 4 double-hours. The night remains for (another) 2 double-hours.

o 1111

U₄ 11-KAM₂

2.12 GUB

min [... mi₃]-⸢in⸣

4 DANNA 12!(1/3) UŠ GUB 1 ⸢DANNA⸣ 15 UŠ KI.MIN<(GE₆)> uḫ-ḫur

(o 11) On the 11th day it is present for 2 12 - two [...] two. It is present for 4 double-hours, 12 UŠ. Ditto (The night remains) for (another) 1 double-hour, 15 UŠ.

o 1212

U₄ 12-KAM₂

2.⸢24 GUB⸣

⸢min⸣ [...]

4 DANNA 24!(4) UŠ GUB ⸢1⸣ DANNA 6 UŠ KI.MIN<(GE₆)> uḫ-ḫur

(o 12) On the 12th day it is present for 2 24 - two [...]. It is present for 4 double-hours, 24 UŠ. Ditto (The night remains) for (another) 1 double-hour, 6 UŠ.

o 1313

[U₄ 13]-⸢KAM₂⸣

⸢2⸣.36 GUB

min ba-⸢ga-ša₂⸣

⸢5 DANNA⸣ [...] ⸢GUB⸣ 2/3 DANNA 4 UŠ KI.MIN<(GE₆)> uḫ-ḫur

(o 13) On the [13]th [day] it is present for 2 36 - two, thirty-six. It is present for 5 double-hours [...]. Ditto (The night remains) for (another) 2/3 double-hour, 4 UŠ.

o 1414

U₄ 14-KAM₂

2.48!(28) GUB

min ni-il di-ri-ga

5 ⸢DANNA 18 UŠ⸣ [...] 12 UŠ GE₆ KI.MIN<(uḫ-ḫur)>

(o 14) On the 14th day it is present for 2 48 - two, twenty (sic) exceeding. [...] 5 double-hours, 18 UŠ [...]. The night ditto (remains) for 12 UŠ.

o 1515

U₄ 15-KAM₂

3 GUB

e!-še

6 ⸢DANNA⸣ GUB [...] KI.MIN<(GE₆)> uḫ-ḫur

(o 15) On the 15th day it is present for 3 - three. It is present for 6 double-hours. Ditto (The night remains) [...].

o 1616

[U₄] 16-KAM₂

12 GE₆ DU-ma

u₂-du-<li> mi₃-⸢in⸣

[x] ⸢UŠ⸣ GE₆ DU-⸢ma⸣ [...]

(o 16) On the 16th [day] night passes for 12 - a single ten (and) two.1 Night passes for [n] UŠ and [...].

o 1717

[U₄] 17-KAM₂

24 GE₆ DU-ma

ni-il lam-ma di-ri-⸢ga⸣

2/3 DANNA 4 UŠ ⸢GE₆⸣ [...]

(o 17) On the 17th [day] night passes for 24 - twenty, four exceeding. Night [...] 2/3 double-hour, 4 UŠ [...].

o 1818

[U₄] 18v-KAM₂

36 GE₆ DU-ma

ba-an-ga-aš₂

1 DANNA 6 ⸢UŠ⸣ [...]

(o 18) On the 18th [day] night passes for 36 - thirty-six. [...] 1 double-hour, 18 UŠ.

o 1919

[U₄] 19-KAM₂

48!(24) ⸢GE₆⸣ DU-ma

ni-il di-ri-⸢ga⸣

1 [DANNA] ⸢18⸣ UŠ ⸢GE₆⸣ [...]

(o 19) On the 19th [day] night passes for 48 - twenty (sic) exceeding. Night [...] 1 [double-hour], 6 UŠ.

o 2020

[U₄ 20]-⸢KAM₂⸣

1 ⸢GE₆⸣ DU-ma

de-eš-⸢šu₂⸣

2 [...] ⸢DU⸣-ma KI.MIN<(...)>

(o 20) On the 20th [day] night passes for 1 00 - one. [...] passes for 2 [...].

o 2121

[U₄ 21]-⸢KAM₂⸣

1.⸢12⸣ GE₆ DU-ma

diš u₂-du-⸢li⸣ [mi₃]-⸢in⸣

2 ⸢DANNA⸣ [...] GE₆ DU-ma <<KI.MIN>>

(o 21) On the 21st [day] night passes for 1 12 - one, a single ten (and) two. Night passes for 2 double-hours [...] and night remains for 3 double-hours, [n] UŠ.

o 2222

3 ⸢DANNA⸣ [x] UŠ GE₆ uḫ!(IM-)ḫu-ur

o 2323

[U₄ 22]-⸢KAM₂⸣

⸢1.24 GE₆ DU-ma⸣

⸢diš ni⸣-[il] ⸢lam⸣-ma [di]-ri-ga

2.2/3 ⸢DANNA⸣ [...] ⸢UŠ⸣ GE₆ DU-ma

(o 23) On the 22nd [day] night passes for 1 24 - one, twenty (and) four exceeding. Night passes for 2 2/3 double-hours [...] and night ditto (remains) for 3 double-hours, [n] UŠ.

o 2424

3 ⸢DANNA⸣ [x] ⸢UŠ⸣ GE₆ KI.MIN<(uḫ-ḫu-ur)>

o 2525

[U₄ 23]-⸢KAM₂⸣

1.36!(26) GE₆ DU-ma

diš ba-an-⸢ga⸣-ša₂

3 DANNA [x] ⸢UŠ⸣ GE₆ KI.MIN<(DU-ma)>

(o 25) On the 23rd [day] night passes for 1 36 - one, thirty-six. Night ditto (passes) for 3 double-hours, [n] UŠ and night ditto (remains) for 2 2/3 double-hours, 4 UŠ.

o 2626

2.2/3 DANNA 4 UŠ GE₆ KI.MIN<(uḫ-ḫu-ur)>

o 2727

[U₄] ⸢24⸣-KAM₂

1.48 GE₆ DU-ma

diš ni-il di-ri-ga

3 DANNA 18 UŠ GE₆ KI.MIN<(DU-ma)>

(o 27) On the 24th [day] night passes for 1 48 - one, twenty (sic) exceeding. Night ditto (passes) for 3 double-hours, 18 UŠ and night ditto (remains) for 2 double-hours, 12 UŠ.

o 2828

2 DANNA 12 UŠ GE₆ KI.MIN<(uḫ-ḫu-ur)>

o 2929

U₄ 25-KAM₂

2 KI.MIN<(GE₆)> DU-ma

mi-⸢in⸣

4 DANNA KI.MIN<(GE₆)> DU-ma1

(o 29) On the 25th day ditto (night passes) for 2 00 - two. Ditto (Night passes) for 4 double-hours and.2

o 3030

U₄ 26-KAM₂

2.30 KI.MIN<(GE₆)> DU-ma

mi-in ba-a

5 DANNA KI.MIN<(GE₆)> DU-ma 1 DANNA GE₆ KI.MIN<(uḫ-ḫu-ur)>

(o 30) On the 26th day ditto (night passes) for 2 30 - two, thirty. Ditto (Night passes) for 5 double-hours (and) night ditto (remains) for 1 double-hour.

o 3131

U₄ 27-KAM₂

2.45 KI.MIN<(GE₆)> DU-ma

mi-in ni-<il> di-ri-ga

5.1/2 DANNA KI.MIN<(GE₆)> DU-ma 1/2 DANNA GE₆ KI.MIN<(uḫ-ḫu-ur)>

(o 31) On the 27th day ditto (night passes) for 2 45 - two, twenty (sic) exceeding. Ditto (Night passes) for 5 1/2 double-hours (and) night ditto (remains) for 1/2 double-hour.

o 3232

U₄ 28v-KAM₂

7 UŠ 30 NINDA

GE₆ uḫ-ḫur

30 KURḫa

(o 32) On the 28th day night remains for 7 UŠ, 30 nindanu. The Moon rises.

o 3333

U₄ 29-KAM₂

3 UŠ 45 NINDA

GE₆ uḫ-ḫur

30 KURḫa na-mir

(o 33) On the 29th day night remains for 3 UŠ, 45 nindanu. The Moon rises (and) is bright.

o 3434

U₄ 30-KAM₂

1 UŠ 52.1/2 NINDA

GE₆ uḫ-ḫur

30 KURḫa na-mir

(o 34) On the 30th day night remains for 1 UŠ 52 1/2 nindanu. The Moon rises (and) is bright.

o 3535

U₄ 1-KAM₂

3!(2)45 GUB

3 UŠ 45 NINDA

DINGIR <ina> U₄ u₂-zu-uz u KURḫa

(o 35) On the 1st day it (the Moon) is present for 3;45 - 3 UŠ, 45 nindanu. The god is present during the day and rises.

Reverse
r 1r 1

* ina itiBARA₂ U₄ 1-[KAM₂ ...] EN.NUN GE₆ 12 UŠ 40 ⸢NINDA⸣ ŠU₂ ša₂ [x]

(r 1) In Nisannu (I), on the 1st day, the night-time watch is [...]. The setting of [...] is 12 UŠ, 40 nindanu.

r 22

* ina itiBARA₂ U₄ ⸢15⸣-[KAM₂ ...] EN.NUN GE₆ 12 UŠ KUR ša₂ ⸢30⸣

(r 2) In Nisannu (I), on the 15th day, the night-time watch is [...]. The rising of the Moon is 12 UŠ.

r 33

[... iti]⸢GU₄ U₄ 1-KAM₂⸣ 2.5/6 [MA].⸢NA⸣ EN.NUN GE₆ 11 UŠ <20 NINDA> ŠU₂ ša₂ 30

(r 3) [In] Ayyaru (II), on the 1st day, the night-time watch is 2 5/6 minas. The setting of the Moon is 11 UŠ, 20 nindanu.

r 44

* ina ⸢iti⸣GU₄ U₄ 15-KAM₂ 2.⸢2/3⸣ [MA].⸢NA⸣ EN.NUN GE₆ 10 UŠ 40 NINDA! KUR ša₂ 30

(r 4) In Ayyaru (II), on the 15th day, the night-time watch is 2 2/3 minas. The rising of the Moon is 10 UŠ, 40 nindanu.

r 55

* ina itiSIG₄ U₄ 1-KAM₂ 2.1/2 MA.⸢NA⸣ EN.NUN GE₆ 10 UŠ ŠU₂ ša₂ 30

(r 5) In Simanu (III), on the 1st day, the night-time watch is 2 1/2 minas. The setting of the Moon is 10 UŠ.

r 66

* ina itiSIG₄ U₄ 15-KAM₂ 2.1/3 MA.NA EN.NUN GE₆ 9 UŠ 20 NINDA KUR ša₂ 30

(r 6) In Simanu (III), on the 15th day, the night-time watch is 2 1/3 minas. The rising of the Moon is 9 UŠ, 20 nindanu.

r 77

* ina itiŠU U₄ 1-KAM₂ 2 MA.⸢NA⸣ 10 ⸢GIN₂⸣ EN.NUN GE₆ 8 ⸢UŠ⸣ 40 NINDA ŠU₂ ša₂ 30

(r 7) In Du'uzu (IV), on the 1st day, the night-time watch is 2 minas, 10 shekels. The setting of the Moon is 8 UŠ, 40 nindanu.

r 88

* ina itiŠU U₄ 15-KAM₂ 2 MA.NA a-li-it EN.NUN GE₆ ⸢8⸣ UŠ KUR ša₂ 30

(r 8) In Du'uzu (IV), on the 15th day, the night-time watch is 2 minas .... The rising of the Moon is 8 UŠ.

r 99

* ina itiNE U₄ 1-KAM₂ 2 MA.NA ⸢10⸣ GIN₂ EN.NUN GE₆ 8 UŠ 40 NINDA ŠU₂ ša₂ 30

(r 9) In Abu (V), on the 1st day, the night-time wach is 2 minas, 10 shekels. The setting of the Moon is 8 UŠ, 40 nindanu.

r 1010

* ina itiNE U₄ 15-KAM₂ 2.1/3 MA.NA EN.NUN GE₆ ⸢9⸣ UŠ 20 NINDA KUR ša₂ 30

(r 10) In Abu (V), on the 15th day, the night-time watch is 2 1/3 minas. The rising of the Moon is 9 UŠ, 20 nindanu.

r 1111

[... iti]⸢KIN U₄ 1-KAM₂ 2⸣.1/2 MA.NA EN.NUN GE₆ 10 UŠ ŠU₂ ša₂ 30

(r 11) [In] Ululu (VI), on the 1st day, the night-time watch is 2 1/2 minas. The setting of the Moon is 10 UŠ.

r 1212

[... 2].⸢2/3⸣ MA.NA EN.NUN GE₆ 10 UŠ 40 NINDA KUR ša₂ 30

(r 12) [...], the night-time watch is 2 2/3 minas. The rising of the Moon is 10 UŠ, 40 nindanu.

r 1313

[... iti]⸢DU₆⸣ U₄ 1-⸢KAM₂⸣ [... MA].NA EN.NUN GE₆ 11!(10) UŠ 20 NINDA! ŠU₂ ša₂ 30

(r 13) [In] Tašritu (VII), on the 1st day, the night-time watch is [...] minas. The setting of the Moon is 11 UŠ, 20 nindanu.

r 1414

* ina ⸢iti⸣DU₆ U₄ 15-KAM₂ 3 ⸢MA⸣.[NA EN].⸢NUN⸣ GE₆ 12 UŠ ⸢40 NINDA⸣ KUR ša₂ 30

(r 14) In Tašritu (VII), on the 15th day, the night-time watch is 3 minas. The rising of the Moon is 12 UŠ, 40 nindanu.

r 1515

* ina itiAPIN U₄ 1-KAM₂ 3 MA.NA 10 ⸢GIN₂⸣ [...] ša₂ 30

(r 15) In Arahsamnu (VIII), on the 1st day, [...] 3 minas, 10 shekels. [...] of the Moon [...].

r 1616

* ina itiAPIN U₄ 15-KAM₂ 3.1/3 MA.NA ⸢EN⸣.[NUN ...]

(r 16) In Arahsamnu (VIII), on the 15th day, the [...] watch is 3 1/3 minas. [...].

r 1717

* ⸢ina itiGAN⸣ U₄ 1-KAM₂ 3.1/2 MA.⸢NA⸣ [...]

(r 17) In Kislimu (IX), on the 1st day, [...] 3 1/2 minas. [...].

r 1818

* ⸢ina itiGAN U₄ 15⸣-KAM₂ ⸢3⸣.2/3 [...] GE₆ 14 ⸢UŠ⸣ [...]

(r 18) In Kislimu (IX), on the 15th day, the night-time [...] 3 2/3 [...] 14 UŠ [...].

r 1919

* ina itiAB U₄ 1-KAM₂ 3.⸢5/6⸣ [...] GE₆ 1/2 DANNA 20 NINDA! [...]

(r 19) In Ṭebetu (X), on the 1st day, the night-time [...] 3 5/6 [...] 1/2 double-hour, 20 nindanu.

r 2020

* ina itiAB U₄ 15-KAM₂ 4 MA.⸢NA EN⸣.NUN GE₆ 16!(13) UŠ KUR ša₂ 30

(r 20) In Ṭebetu (X), on the 15th day, the night-time watch is 4 minas. The rising of the Moon is 16 UŠ.

r 2121

* ina itiZIZ₂ U₄ 1-KAM₂ 3.5/6 MA.NA EN.NUN GE₆ 1/2 DANNA 20 NINDA ŠU₂ ša₂ 30

(r 21) In Šabaṭu (XI), on the 1st day, the night-time watch is 3 5/6 minas. The setting of the Moon is 1/2 double-hour, 20 nindanu.

r 2222

* ina itiZIZ₂ U₄ 15-KAM₂ 3.⸢2/3 MA⸣.NA EN.NUN GE₆ 14 UŠ 40 NINDA KUR ša₂ 30

(r 22) In Šabaṭu (XI), on the 15th day, the night-time watch is 3 2/3 minas. The rising of the Moon is 14 UŠ, 40 nindanu.

r 2323

* ina itiŠE U₄ 1-KAM₂ 3.⸢1/2 MA⸣.NA EN.NUN GE₆ 14 UŠ ŠU₂ ša₂ 30

(r 23) In Addaru (XII), on the 1st day, the night-time watch is 3 1/2 minas. The setting of the Moon is 14 UŠ.

r 2424

* ina itiŠE U₄ 15!(1-)KAM₂ 3.1/3!(5/6) [MA].⸢NA⸣ EN.NUN GE₆ 13 UŠ <20 NINDA> KUR ša₂ 30

(r 24) In Addaru (XII), on the 15th day, the night-time watch is 3 1/3 minas. The rising of the Moon is 13 UŠ, 20 nindanu.

r 2525

1 GIN₂ 1 UŠ 2 GIN₂ 2 UŠ ⸢3 GIN₂⸣ 3 ⸢UŠ⸣ 4 GIN₂ 4 UŠ 5 GIN₂ 5 UŠ

(r 25) 1 shekel = 1 UŠ. 2 shekels = 2 UŠ. 3 shekels = 3 UŠ. 4 shekels = UŠ. 5 shekels = 5 UŠ.

r 2626

6 GIN₂ 6 UŠ 7 GIN₂ 7 ⸢UŠ 8 GIN₂⸣ 8 UŠ 9 GIN₂ 9 UŠ 10 GIN₂ 10 UŠ

(r 26) 6 shekels = 6 UŠ. 7 shekels = 7 UŠ. 8 shekels = 8 UŠ. 9 shekels = 9 UŠ. 10 shekels = 10 UŠ.

r 2727

15 GIN₂ 1/2 DANNA 20!(12) GIN₂ ⸢2/3⸣ DANNA 1/2 MA.NA DANNA 1 MA.NA 2 DANNA

(r 27) 15 shekels = 1/2 double-hour. 20 shekels = 2/3 double-hour. 1/2 mina = a double-hour. 1 mina = 2 double-hours.

r 2828

uz-na šu-kun-ma an-na-a a-mur-ma

(r 28) Attend and examine this, so that your learning may succeed.

r 2929

[a]-⸢ḫa⸣-zu-ka liš!(DIŠ-)li-mu

1An extra line is expected here in the fourth column: 2 DANNA GE₆ uh-hu-ur.

1 That is , before the Moon rises.

2 An extra line is expected here in the fourth column : "night remains for 2 double-hours"
